alerts.headline: Lake Wind Advisory issued May 16 at 10:18PM PDT until May 17 at 11:00PM PDT by NWS Reno NV
alerts.description:
* WHAT...North winds 20 to 25 mph with gusts up to 40 mph for Washoe
Lake.

* WHERE...Greater Reno-Carson City-Minden Area.

* WHEN...From 11 AM to 11 PM PDT Sunday.

* IMPACTS...Small boats, kayaks and paddle boards will be prone to
capsizing and should remain off lake waters until conditions
improve.
alerts.instruction:
Check lake conditions before heading out and be prepared for a
sudden increase in winds and wave heights. Consider postponing
boating activities on the lake until a day with less wind.

alerts.headline: Dust Storm Warning issued May 17 at 4:34PM PDT until May 17 at 5:00PM PDT by NWS Las Vegas NV
alerts.description:
At 433 PM PDT, a dust channel was over Texas Springs Campground, or
near Furnace Creek, moving south at 30 mph.

HAZARD...Near zero visibility with damaging wind in excess of 60
mph.

SOURCE...Detected by satellite.

IMPACT...Dangerous life-threatening travel.

Highway 190, Scottys Castle Road and Daylight Pass Road will all be
impacted by this dust storm.

Locations impacted include...
Stovepipe Wells, Furnace Creek, Mesquite Springs Campground, Scottys
Castle, and Texas Springs Campground.
alerts.instruction: Motorists should not drive into a dust storm. PULL ASIDE STAY ALIVE!

alerts.headline: High Wind Warning issued May 17 at 10:46AM PDT until May 18 at 5:00AM PDT by NWS Las Vegas NV
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Northwest winds 25 to 35 mph with gusts between 50 and 60
mph. A few gusts to 70 mph are possible.

* WHERE...White and Inyo Mountains, Eastern Sierra Slopes, Death
Valley National Park, Owens Valley South, Owens Valley North, and
Esmeralda and Central Nye County.

* WHEN...Until 5 AM PDT Monday.

* IMPACTS...Damaging winds will blow down trees and power lines.
Widespread power outages are expected. Travel will be difficult,
especially for high-profile vehicles.
alerts.instruction:
Watch for falling debris, tree limbs and downed power lines or
poles. Use extra caution if you must drive.
